title: GloveCraft
description: A Monster And Card Battle Game
body:
![Overveiw](https://i.imgur.com/VQMcSjn.png)
GloveCraft is an exciting, brand-new creature-collecting game that reimagines the world of Minecraft in a thrilling new way. Dive into an expansive universe where you can discover, capture, and train a vast array of unique creatures, each with their own abilities, traits, and personalities. As you explore the vast landscapes, you'll uncover hidden species, unlock powerful cards to enhance your creatures, and face challenges that test your strategy and resourcefulness. With GloveCraft, the world of Minecraft becomes a playground for creature collectors and adventurers alike—building, battling, and collecting like never before!
Special Thank You To
